title: 옵시디언 표준사양 문서 최신화
summary: specs.sqlite를 기준으로 generated Obsidian spec notes와 graph output을 갱신하는 반복 작업 recipe.
trigger_examples: SQLite 기준으로 Obsidian vault export 갱신
steps: Check sqlite schema version and source ledger.
Render generated Markdown notes from template.
Write source metadata as frontmatter and plain text, not wikilinks.
Run broken-link and generated-note count checks.
Create compact refresh report and run log.
rules: SQLite specs table is the local normalized source of truth.
Obsidian generated notes are read-only views.
section_path values such as 3.1.1 must not become Obsidian links or graph nodes.
Do not store raw original specs in agentic memory.
validation: sqlite spec count equals generated note count.
all generated notes include source_file, source_row or source_section, and source_hash.
refresh report lists changed, unchanged, added, removed, and warning counts.
